$note: Per-project pipeline behavior. Loaded into every agent (via context-map 'always'). Agents/orchestrator HONOR these values instead of hardcoding them. Edit per project; no prompt edits needed.

$docs.paths.code_roots: Per-project EXTRA write globs for the DEVELOPER fence, merged on top of the kit's built-in code roots (src/**, app/**, lib/**, …). Use when this project's code lives outside the standard layout — e.g. nwidart/laravel-modules: ["Modules/**"]. Globs: 'dir/**' = anything under dir; '**' spans path segments, '*' stays within one. This `paths` key is PRESERVED across `kiro-sdlc-init --force` (the rest of this file is kit-regenerated). Empty = no change.
$docs.paths.test_roots: Per-project EXTRA write globs for module/colocated TESTS — granted to the developer AND to qa (qa otherwise stays test-only and never gets code_roots). E.g. laravel-modules tests: ["Modules/**/Tests/**"]. Empty = no change.
$docs.gates.auto_pass: true = orchestrator auto-approves a gate when its audit has 0 blockers (still stops on any blocker). false = always require explicit human approve.
$docs.gates.convergence: Rigor of the quality gates. auto = ASK once at kickoff (full vs lite) for feature/cr/rebuild; bugfix/hotfix are always lite. always = force full (convergence loop) on every change. never = always single-pass (legacy). A runtime flag --rigor=full|lite on the sdlc command overrides this. Honored by the orchestrator.
$docs.gates.stable_rounds: When rigor=full, a convergence gate re-runs its audit until the blocker/gap list is identical this many consecutive rounds before it can PASS. Higher = stricter + slower.
$docs.gates.convergence_gates: Which gates run the convergence loop when rigor=full. Others stay single-pass. Default: spec (SPEC_LOCK) + design (DESIGN_REVIEW) — where business-logic gaps hide.
$docs.qa.testcase_export: DEFAULT SEED for the per-pipeline test-case artifact choice (not the final word). At kickoff the orchestrator resolves PER CHANGE: runtime flag (--xlsx/--md/--no-xlsx) → this config seed → ASK one question, then persists the answer to _state.json.testcase_export — which is what the qa agent reads at S5. Values: auto = derive default by rigor (full→xlsx, lite→md, hotfix→none) then ask; xlsx/md/none = that value is the offered default. When the resolved value is xlsx/md, the file qa/testcases.{xlsx|md|csv} is a HARD prerequisite of the S5 gate. Important projects: set xlsx.
$docs.coverage.diff_threshold: % of CHANGED lines that must be covered (developer S4 gate).
$docs.tests.final_scope: How wide the DEVELOPER S4 FINAL checkpoint and the QA S5 independent re-run reach — both use the SAME scope, resolved once and persisted to _state.json.test_scope. auto (default) = derive by rigor: full→full (whole-app suite); lite→module (test + lint/static-analysis commands restricted to the module/directory containing every file the change touched, siblings included — still catches regressions next to the edit, just not across the whole app). module/full = pin that value regardless of rigor. A runtime flag --test-scope=module|full overrides. QA must never unilaterally run wider than this — a wider run is an orchestrator escalation (state-set test_scope=full), not a QA-side decision.
$docs.security.stride_analysis: auto = run STRIDE threat-model only when the feature touches auth/payment/PII; always = every feature; never = skip. Honored by analyst (early risk) + qa.
$docs.test_framework: auto = use the framework in context/stack.md; or pin one (e.g. vitest, jest, playwright, pytest, phpunit).
$docs.sonar_scan: true = run a SonarQube quality gate in S4 if configured; false = skip.
$docs.git.isolation: Cô lập code cho mỗi pipeline MỚI. ask = orchestrator hỏi branch-hay-worktree mỗi change mới; branch = luôn git checkout -b tại chỗ; worktree = luôn git worktree add thư mục riêng; off = không tự cô lập (KHÔNG khuyến nghị). Khi != off, orchestrator tạo nhánh/worktree ngay khi `openspec new change`, TRƯỚC phase đầu.
$docs.git.default_method: Dùng khi isolation=ask và user không nêu rõ: branch | worktree.
$docs.git.worktree_path: Mẫu đường dẫn thư mục worktree (chỉ khi method=worktree). Placeholder: {repo} {type} {ticket} {slug}.
$docs.git.protected_branches: KHÔNG được code trực tiếp trên các nhánh này — orchestrator phải tạo nhánh/worktree mới trước khi vào phase đầu.
